articles.headline: Afghanistan's capital is in the grip of a water crisis
articles.description: Nestled in a high-altitude valley in Afghanistan's Hindu Kush mountain range, Kabul is rapidly running out of water

articles.headline: Federal Aid Available for Washington Residents Impacted by Floods
articles.description: Federal disaster assistance has been made available for Washington residents impacted by the December 2025 floods. The Federal Emergency Management Agency made aid is available to people in the counties of Chelan, Grays Harbor, King, Lewis, Pacific, Pierce, S…

articles.headline: Intense storms leave significant damage in multiple Kansas counties
articles.description: Multiple homes are without power and significantly damaged after multiple rounds of intense storms swept through southern Kansas counties.
